creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed as or ports r450622 with modifications: particularly, I've decided to keep GStreamer support off by default since it is a heavy dependency and having "download sound" hardly justifies it.

Regenerating patches just to shut up portlint(1) is gratuitous change and should also be avoided as it is simply clutters the commit batch and causes extra repo churn rather than doing any real real good.  Patches should be regenerated when their functional contents also change.

If you disagree, I suggest you take maintainership back and start committing your own changes by yourself again. :-)
